testcase.name: test_set_get_exists_and_expiration

testcase.name: test_delete_with_faulty_disk_cache_does_not_fail
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: C:\Users\AILeo\AppData\Local\Temp\pytest-of-AILeo\pytest-3910\popen-gw0\test_delete_with_faulty_disk_c0\cache ERROR data_cache_manager:cache_manager.py:514 Failed to set cache: disk-write-fail ERROR data_cache_manager:cache_manager.py:531 Failed to delete cache: disk-delete-fail --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_cleanup_thread_stop_on_close
